name: Shipmondo API
description:
This is the official API for Shipmondo. The current version is v3.
The Shipmondo API is documented using OpenAPI. You can find the OpenAPI spec here: https://app.shipmondo.com/api/public/v3/openapi.json


We recommend that new implementations should be based on this version.


We provide an official library for PHP, which you can find here: https://github.com/shipmondo/shipmondo_php_sdk


If you need further assistance for your implementation, feel free to contact us at support@shipmondo.com
